name: Citation Key Sculptor
description: Writes CitationSculptor-style citation keys to the native citationKey field and renames child PDFs deterministically (<citationKey>.pdf, <citationKey>-2.pdf, ...). Grounds DOI-only PubMed items to native PMID before DOI fallback; brief-title fallback for items lacking PMID/DOI/URL; keys by primary creator of any type. Independent of Better BibTeX.
